data.desc:
Asking price is R3,250,000.00

Offers considered.

Real Estate Company proudly presents this elegant Hillcrest residence, now open to offers.

Set on an expansive 1,870 m² stand in one of Hillcrest Centrals most sought-after addresses, this beautifully maintained home offers a refined blend of privacy, space, and effortless indoor-outdoor living.

The heart of the home is a stylish galley-style kitchen finished with granite countertops, generous cabinetry, and a separate scullery, flowing seamlessly into sophisticated open-plan living and dining areas designed for both intimate family living and elegant entertaining.

French doors extend the living spaces onto an expansive covered patio, an inviting setting for leisurely mornings, alfresco dining, and relaxed entertaining while overlooking the manicured, mature garden. The sparkling swimming pool and lush lawns create a serene outdoor sanctuary, ideal for children, pets, and hosting guests in style.

The main residence comprises three generously proportioned bedrooms and two beautifully appointed bathrooms, including a main en-suite, all thoughtfully arranged on a single level for ease and comfort.

An exceptional added value is the private two-bedroom cottage, discreetly positioned at the rear of the property. Currently generating R10,000 per month, this income stream contributes significantly toward bond repayments, offering both flexibility and long-term investment appeal.

Situated within a secure and well-regarded Hillcrest neighbourhood, the home enjoys close proximity to top schools, premier shopping centres, and Hillcrests renowned weekend farmers markets. A strong sense of community and an active neighbourhood watch ensure peace of mind.

Additional features include:

Double garage

Covered and ample off-street parking

CCTV security system

24-hour armed response monitoring

Sparkling swimming pool and established gardens

This is a home of quiet sophistication and exceptional lifestyle appeal offering space, security, and income potential in one of the Upper Highways most desirable locations.

Show more
